sample_reviews.author: James T.
sample_reviews.text: Called M16 Plumbing for a burst pipe late in the day and they were with me within the hour. Sorted quickly and at a fair price. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M.
sample_reviews.text: Really professional service from start to finish. Fitted a new bathroom suite and the work was clean and tidy. Will definitely use again.

sample_reviews.author: David R.
sample_reviews.text: Good reliable plumber, turned up on time and fixed our boiler issue without any fuss. Reasonable prices for the Manchester area.

brand.usp: M16 Plumbing delivers fast, honest plumbing services across Manchester with no call-out surprises — just quality workmanship at fair prices.
brand.hero_headline: Your Local Manchester Plumber, Ready When You Need Us
brand.about_paragraph: I'm a fully qualified, Gas Safe registered plumber based in the M16 area of Manchester, offering reliable plumbing and heating services to homeowners and landlords across the city. Whether it's an emergency repair, a new bathroom installation, or a boiler service, I take pride in getting the job done right first time. I believe in clear, upfront pricing and leaving your home exactly as I found it — clean and tidy.
